\newcommand{\DrInfeas}{0}  % infeasible DR schedules over every arm, regime and seed
\newcommand{\DrAhead}{15}\newcommand{\DrCells}{16}  % (arm,regime) cells where DR is statistically ahead of the best rule / total

\newcommand{\DrIndN}{-1.64}\newcommand{\DrIndNLo}{-2.06}\newcommand{\DrIndNHi}{-1.21}  % ind N: DR policy vs best rule (%), CI
\newcommand{\DrPriceIndN}{-0.28}\newcommand{\DrPriceIndNLo}{-0.62}\newcommand{\DrPriceIndNHi}{+0.05}  % ind N: DR minus joint-v1 (%), CI; + = DR costs more
